formulas.formula: ="What Should I Study Next?  -  Today is "&TEXT(TODAY(),"dddd, mmm d")

=IF(INDEX(TopicWeight,MATCH(LARGE(PriorityKey,1),PriorityKey,0))>=10,"High exam weight - core scoring chapter",IF(INDEX(TopicConf,MATCH(LARGE(PriorityKey,1),PriorityKey,0))<=2,"Low confidence + high value - high gain",IF(INDEX(TopicQuickWin,MATCH(LARGE(PriorityKey,1),PriorityKey,0))>=4,"Quick win - low effort, high return",IF(INDEX(TopicTier,MATCH(LARGE(PriorityKey,1),PriorityKey,0))=1,"Tier 1 must-cover topic","Strong supporting topic"))))

data_validations.formula1: "Deep Study,Standard Study,Fast Review,Light Review,Skip Unless Time"

formulas.formula: =IF(A2="No","Skip for Now",IF(A2="Later","Defer",IF(OR(O2>=1,P2="Exam Ready"),"Keep Warm",IF(P2="Skipped","Skip for Now",IF(K2>=6,"Study Next",IF(K2>=4.5,"Study This Week",IF(K2>=3,"Practice","Review")))))))
